creator: klui@cup.hp.com
text:
On Tue, 16 Jan 2001, Soren Schmidt wrote:
> Could you mail me the dmesg output from a verbose boot, and the
> output from a pciconf -l please ?

Oops, I just realized the dmesg output from a verbose boot is
not the same as a normal dmesg. Here's the output from a boot -v.


Ken
